message:
fix(mcp): rustfmt compliance + kalman watchdog telemetry proptests

MCP bridge/tools formatting:
- mcp_bridge.rs: collapse single-line use statement, fix nested .tool()
  call closing parenthesis alignment for WaTxRollbackTool
- mcp_tools.rs: rustfmt-compliant reformatting of mission pause/resume/abort
  tool handlers — flatten tags vec!, adjust match arm indentation for
  pause_mission/resume_mission calls, reflow chained iterator in
  WaMissionExplainTool

Kalman watchdog test expansion (+331 lines):
- Fix 3 tests requiring `let mut watchdog` (check_health/classify_component
  now take &mut self for telemetry tracking)
- Import AdaptiveWatchdogTelemetrySnapshot for serde roundtrip tests
- Add 12 new proptest properties for telemetry counter invariants:
  - observations count equals total observe() calls
  - observations_matched equals observations for standard components
  - observations_matched <= observations always holds
  - health_checks count equals check_health() calls
  - classifications count equals classify_component() calls
  - resets count equals reset() calls
  - status counters match actual statuses from classify_component
  - status counters match actual statuses from check_health
  - all telemetry starts at zero for arbitrary configs
  - counters monotonically non-decreasing across mixed operations
  - telemetry snapshot serde roundtrip preserves all fields
  - total status sum == classify calls + (check_health calls * 4)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
